summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Planning Poker MVP - all core functionality working correctly

ui_bugs.issue: Copy link functionality shows permission denied error in browser console
ui_bugs.note: Functionality works but shows console error due to browser security restrictions in automated testing

ui_bugs.issue: Nested button elements causing HTML validation warnings
ui_bugs.selector: story item buttons with delete buttons inside
ui_bugs.note: Console warning about nested buttons - should restructure HTML to avoid button inside button

passed_tests: User signup flow with JWT token generation
User login flow with existing credentials (po@test.com)
Story status updates (ready -> voting -> completed -> ready)
Frontend landing page with Create/Join room cards
Room page with split pane layout
PO controls (Start Voting, Reveal, Reset) - visible only to room owner
Vote table with participant cards and flip animations
Average calculation after reveal (5.0 pts displayed correctly)
Guest user flow - join dialog and room access
Error handling for invalid room hash
